name: Отжимания на брусьях
prompt:
Create a premium text-free instructional fitness illustration for a mobile personal trainer app.

Exercise: Отжимания на брусьях (bar-dips / parallel bar dips)
Target muscles: triceps, lower chest, anterior deltoid
Equipment: parallel bars / dip station
Movement to show: athlete supporting on parallel bars with arms straight, then lowering body by bending elbows to 90°, then pressing back up. Body stays vertical (triceps focus) with no swinging. Split-screen showing both top and bottom phases.

Visual style must match the existing exercise guide images in this product: realistic modern gym, clean premium editorial lighting, warm neutral tones with wooden slat walls and concrete textures, one male athlete demonstrating correct technique with a charcoal grey t-shirt and black shorts, subtle ghost-position or motion arrows in semi-transparent golden gradient showing the movement path, uncluttered background with blurred gym equipment (bokeh), side profile / 3/4 view composition, cinematic lighting with soft shadows and rim light on muscles, app-friendly instructional composition.

Hard constraints:
- No readable text, no letters, no numbers, no captions, no logos, no watermarks, no UI labels.
- Do not include pseudo-text on machines, clothing, walls, screens, or equipment.
- Avoid exaggerated anatomy, unsafe form, distorted hands, extra limbs, or impossible equipment.
- Show correct, safe technique clearly enough that a gym user can understand the exercise from the image.
- Landscape 3:2-ish composition suitable for a 3/4-screen exercise modal.
